text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... I wish my glasses wouldn't fog up<n>after
practice.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've almost tripped thanks to that fog...<n>But I
don't think I'm ready for contacts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My glasses are a part of me. If<n>only I
could find lenses that didn't fog—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's it! If we cannot buy them, we<n>need only
make some! I'll speak to<n>Tachyon at once.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
T-Tachyon? I think you might be onto<n>something,
but... I'm not sure asking her<n>is a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You know... Tachyon's experiments<n>always make
Cafe run and hide in the<n>library...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But trial and error is necessary for<n>progress. We
cannot expect results<n>without sacrifice.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I will be that sacrifice. Once<n>a
prototype has been prepared, I shall<n>let you
know.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Even if Tachyon's research<n>leaves me
with a pair of glasses with<n>legs... I will continue
on!
